Command.Name: profile
Command.Description: Handles Authentication

Command.Name: list
Command.Description: List profiles

Command.Name: create
Command.Description: Create a new profile

Option.Description: Ignore certificate issues; [[true|false]]
Tokenbased Authentication (with MSAL)
Set specific protocol; [[ssl3|tls|tls11|tls12]]
Skip testing of the connection

Command.Name: delete
Command.Description: Delete a profile

Command.Name: select
Command.Description: Select a profile

Command.Name: purge
Command.Description: Purge all profiles

Command.Name: export
Command.Description: Exports artifacts from the current Dataverse Environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: teamtemplates
Command.Description: Exports the existing teamtemplates from the current environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: bulkdeletes
Command.Description: Exports the bulk delete jobs from the current environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: queues
Command.Description: Exports the existing queues from the current environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: documenttemplates
Command.Description: Exports the existing document templates from the curent environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: calendars
Command.Description: Exports the existing calendars from the current environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: slaconfigs
Command.Description: exports the existing slas from the current environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: routingruleconfigs
Command.Description: Exports the existing routing rules from the current environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: userroles
Command.Description: Exports the user assigned security roles from the current environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: outlooktemplates
Command.Description: Exports the existing outlook templates from the current environment

Option.Description: Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is <task>.json

Command.Name: maintenance
Command.Description: Executes maintenance Tasks against the current Dataverse environment

Command.Name: bulkdelete
Command.Description: Starts an bulk delete job for the given fetchXml and waits for completion

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!

Command.Name: autonumber
Command.Description: Sets the auto number format for specified columns

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!

Command.Name: protectfields
Command.Description: Prevents all calculated fields from receiving an active layer.

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!

Command.Name: carrierinfo
Command.Description: Exports all active carriers from an environment to a json file. To see what an carrier is check [link]https://dev.azure.com/ec4u/Dynamics%20DevLab/_wiki/wikis/Dynamics-DevLab.w iki/111/Solution-Concept[/]

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Exportfile name, default is carrier.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!

Command.Name: solution-version
Command.Description: Increments the solution version by given flag

Argument.Name: Solution
Argument.Description: The unique name of the solution to increment version

Option.Description: Increment the build version eg 1.0.0.0 -> 1.0.1.0
Increment the major version eg 1.0.0.0 -> 2.0.0.0
Increment the minor version eg 1.0.0.0 -> 1.1.0.0
Increment the revision version eg 1.0.0.0 -> 1.0.0.1

Command.Name: createworkflowstate
Command.Description: Creates a workflowstate configuration file

Option.Description: Full path to the output file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json
If set to true the output file will be overwritten if it exists
Comma separated list of publisher names to consider. Wildcards (%) are allowed
Comma separated list of solution uniquenames to consider. Wildcards (%) are allowed
Print a table report to the console after the config file has been created

Command.Name: workflowstate
Command.Description: Updates workflows with given configuration

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json
Print a table report to the console after the config file has been created

Command.Name: removeredundantcomponents
Command.Description: Removes solution components that are already existing

Argument.Name: SourceSolutions
Argument.Description: The unique name of the solutions where the elements are read out, can be comma separeted if multiple

Argument.Name: TargetSolution
Argument.Description: The unique name of the solution where elements that are also contained in the source solution are removed

Option.Description: Report only what would be removed
Also remove Entities (experimental)!

Command.Name: filterfxplugins
Command.Description: Add Messagefiltering for PowerFx Plugins

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!

Command.Name: ensuresdksteps
Command.Description: Ensure sdk steps within a solution are enabled (or disabled)

Option.Description: true if steps should be disabled, false otherwise
do not perform any updates
unique name of the solution to work on

Command.Name: analyze
Command.Description: Analyze specific Dataverse Artifacts in the current Environment

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json

Command.Name: entityallassets
Command.Description: Scans the specified solutions for entities containing with assets

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json

Command.Name: noactivelayer
Command.Description: Scans the specified (unmanaged) solutions for components without active layer

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json

Command.Name: redundantcomponents
Command.Description: Scans for components that are in multiple of the specified solutions

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json

Command.Name: redundantpatches
Command.Description: Scans for patch solutions that are not longer needed because all contained elements are not top-layer anymore

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json

Command.Name: activelayer
Command.Description: Scans the specified (managed) solutions for components with active layer

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json

Command.Name: toplayer
Command.Description: Scans the specified (managed) solutions for components where solution is not top layer

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json

Command.Name: import
Command.Description: import specific artifacts in the current Dataverse environment

Option.Description: Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!
Assignee aka Record Owner
Full path to the file dir, e.g.C:\temp
Importfile name, default is <task>.json
Inline data instead of files, only supported for some single tasks!

Command.Name: codegeneration
Command.Description: Generates .cs, .ts and metadata.xml modelfiles for Dataverse

Argument.Name: TargetDirectory
Argument.Description: Full path to the directory where the generated model classes will be saved

Option.Description: Full path to the config file, e.g. C:\temp\config.json
Define an alternate name for the model folder. The default will be 'Model'

Command.Name: push
Command.Description: Import specific Dataverse Artefacts

Argument.Name: FileOrFolder
Argument.Description: Full path to the dll file, e.g. C:\temp\plugin.dll or to folder for webressources

Option.Description: Configuration file for webressources mapping
Delete obsolete unmanaged webressources in solution; dangerous!
Publish changed objects
Add Objects to Solution; default: none; mandatory for webressources
